name: 1Password
description: 1Password secret provider integration for OpenClaw — batch-resolves secrets from your vaults via the op CLI.

vault.description: 1Password vault name to read secrets from, e.g. 'Openclaw'

field.description: Field name within each item to read (default: 'credential')

items.description: Maps each SecretRef id to its 1Password item name in the configured vault, e.g. { "brave-search": "Brave search" }. Required for every id referenced: OpenClaw restricts SecretRef ids to letters, digits, and '._:/#-' (no spaces), so item names commonly aren't valid ids on their own.

secret-store.description: Reads secrets from 1Password vaults using the op CLI. SecretRef ids are mapped to 1Password items: op://<vault>/<id>/<field>.
